name: @metorial/deepgram
description: Transcribe pre-recorded and live streaming audio to text in 45+ languages with speaker diarization, smart formatting, and keyword boosting. Convert text to natural-sounding speech with 40+ voice options. Analyze transcripts for sentiment, topics, summaries, and intents. Build conversational voice agents with integrated STT, LLM reasoning, and TTS in a single session. Manage projects, API keys, members, billing, and usage. Discover available models and their metadata. Supports asynchronous processing via callbacks for both transcription and speech synthesis.
